name: Corn Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the corn meal, dry mustard, salt, flour, sugar, baking powder, and shortening.
2. In a separate bowl, combine milk and egg, stirring slightly to mix.
3. Pour the milk mixture into the sifted ingredients, stirring until smooth.
4. Dip each frankfurter in the batter, ensuring it is fully coated.
5. Place the battered frankfurters in hot oil and cook until golden brown on all sides.
6. Remove the cooked corn dogs from the oil using tongs or a slotted spoon.
7. Drain excess oil on paper towels.
8. Serve hot with mustard.
